---
title: "ravens.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/core/commands/ravens.ts"
loc: 128
complexity: 17
logic_score: 0.90
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 3.88
overall_score: 2.65
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [execa](file://execa)

### Exports
- `registerRavenCommand`
- `registerRavenCommand`
- `ravens`
- `muninnPidPath`
- `pid`
- `pythonPath`
- `mainLoopScript`
- `args`
- `child`
- `muninnPidPath`
- `pid`
- `displayStatus`
- `muninnPidPath`
- `muninnStatus`
- `pid`
- `envPath`
- `envContent`
- `isSet`
- `wardenDir`
- `active_wardens`
- `displayWardens`
- `i`
- `w1`
- `w2`
